description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by landscaped greenery, including numerous trees and a fenced perimeter. The structure features a flat roof and a geometric layout with multiple interconnected rectangular sections, some of which have rooftop terraces. The property includes a large paved driveway, a tennis or basketball court, and a spacious backyard area. The exterior walls are finished in light neutral tones, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light. The grounds are meticulously organized, with clear separations between the living spaces, recreational areas, and garden zones. The overall design emphasizes open space, privacy, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with large windows, landscaped gardens, and recreational areas including a court and driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from above the main entrance, highlighting the driveway, front garden, and the court area to the left.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the bungalow from the side, emphasizing the fenced boundary, side garden, and the linear arrangement of the building sections.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a rear perspective, showcasing the backyard, dense tree coverage, and the interconnected flat-roofed sections.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the property from the back corner, focusing on the court, rear garden, and the overall spread of the bungalow and its landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
